title: Bridge Essay: Intrusive thinking: Circuit and synaptic mechanisms of a transdiagnostic psychia

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Non-fabrication** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Non-fabrication — spontaneous thought, mind-wandering, DMN, creative insight.

**Intrusive thinking: Circuit and synaptic mechanisms of atransdiagnostic psychiatric symptom.**. Neurosci Biobehav Rev.. PMID: 37094741. DOI: 10.1016/j.neubiorev.2023.105196. Spontaneous thought is an adaptive cognitive process that can produce novel and insightful thought sequences useful in guiding future behavior. In many psychiatric disorders, spontaneous thinking becomes intrusive and uncontrolled, and can trigger symptoms such as craving, repetitive negative thinking and trauma-related memories.
